integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Sentrifugo HRMS web interface to input the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the Sentrifugo web UI, clicking on employee profiles, and filling out web forms, rather than using terminal commands to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent opened and read the expat_immigration_audit.txt file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text file expat_immigration_audit.txt open in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The immigration records are genuinely saved in the Sentrifugo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the records in a saved state within the Sentrifugo UI (e.g., in a list or view mode, or a success message after saving), not just typed into an unsaved form.
